patches.summary: Add read-only Azure Cost Management, Resource Graph, anomaly, and retail price workflows.
patches.reason: A generated command scaffold needed real FinOps behavior before publishing so engineers can validate actual Azure spend and tag hygiene locally.
patches.validated_outcome: Go tests passed, command dry-runs produced read-only request shapes, and live local validation passed for Cost Management, Resource Graph, and Retail Prices with sanitized output.

patches.summary: Add plain-language README and skill guidance for actual spend, tag hygiene, and estimate workflows.
patches.reason: Cloud cost tooling needs to explain the difference between actual billed spend and public retail prices for nontechnical readers and agent users.
patches.validated_outcome: README and skill examples use placeholders only and do not include Azure subscription IDs, tenant IDs, emails, resource IDs, resource group names, or exact spend values.
